training_status: actively trying to lose fat and improve body composition
health_conditions: chronic pain from club foot surgery

benefits.description: planned fat loss and appetite control with retatrutide
planned reduction of chronic pain to enable more consistent movement
planned tissue repair and recovery support with GLOW
planned meaningful fat loss and improved body composition

side_effects.description: user prepared to pull back on dosing if nausea occurs

protocol_notes: Starting conservatively with retatrutide and GLOW (blend likely containing BPC-157 and TB-500). Planning to titrate slowly and monitor for side effects. Decided to drop tesamorelin based on community feedback that retatrutide covers fat loss sufficiently. User is working with doctor on diet, movement, and labs. Treating peptides as support tool, not magic fix.
